system.description: This spell resembles summon animals. The spell conjures one or more beasts or plants with total HD equal to the caster's level. Thus, a 9th level caster can summon one 9 HD creature, two 4 HD creatures plus one 1 HD creature or nine 1 HD creatures. The caster must choose either beasts or plants; not a mixture of the two. The caster chooses the HD distribution desired, and the spell attempts to accommodate the request. The caster does not choose the specific type of creature summoned, but a request can be made (as with summon animals). The types of beasts which can be summoned are left to the discretion of the Castle Keeper.
